attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SIRV.OBJECT_ID, SIRV.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SIRV.LINE_NUMBER, SIRV.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, SIRV.LINE_TYPE, SIRV.LINE_TYPE_NAME, SIRV.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL, SIRV.EXT_LIST_PRICE, SIRV.QUANTITY, SIRV.FINAL_NET_PRICE, SIRV.PART_NUMBER, SIRV.DESCRIPTION, SIRV.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, SIRV.DURATION, SIRV.CONTRACTUAL_DISC, SIRV.MLB_INDICATOR, SIRV.PROMO_DISC, SIRV.NONSTANDARD_DISC, SIRV.TRADE_IN_DISC, SIRV.MULTI_YEAR_DISC, SIRV.ACTIVE, SIRV.CREATED_DATE, SIRV.CREATED_BY, SIRV.UPDATED_DATE, SIRV.UPDATED_BY, SIRV.WEB_ORDER_ID, SIRV.ORDER_STATUS, SIRV.WF_PRICED, SIRV.SMT_LINE_ID_INT, SIRV.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, SIRV.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD, SIRV.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC, SIRV.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, SIRV.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD, SIRV.OEM_REB_FLAG, SIRV.PROGRAM_ID, SIRV.AS_PROJECT_NUMBER, SIRV.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW SIRV
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW ELRV
where SIRV.OBJECT_ID=ELRV.OBJECT_ID)
